Terminids.title: Mock Terminid Order
Terminids.briefing: [MOCK] Terminid swarms are advancing on the Inner Colonies. Helldivers must push back the infestation and reclaim these worlds for Super Earth.
Terminids.description: All available Helldivers are ordered to deploy immediately. For Super Earth.

Automaton.title: Mock Automaton Order
Automaton.briefing: [MOCK] Automaton forces are launching coordinated assaults across two fronts. Helldivers must hold the line and repel the mechanical invasion.
Automaton.description: Defensive operations are authorized at full scale. Managed Democracy prevails.

Illuminate.title: Mock Illuminate Order
Illuminate.briefing: [MOCK] High Command has issued a multi-front extermination order. Helldivers are to engage and eliminate enemy forces across all active theaters.
Illuminate.description: No quarter. No retreat. Liberty or death.
